info.title: Fleet-Master-API
info.description: A comprehensive Fleet and Asset Management System designed to track vehicles, drones, and equipment. This API manages user authentication via OAuth, tracks detailed maintenance records, and monitors real-time deployment locations. Developed for the CSE341 Team Project.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Operations for user management and OAuth profiles

tags.name: Assets
tags.description: CRUD operations for vehicles, drones, and equipment

tags.name: Maintenance
tags.description: Tracking service history and repair logs

tags.name: Locations
tags.description: Managing deployment sites and storage hubs
